# Gamma Tech Group

> AI automation & workflow consulting for Atlanta-area businesses. We help companies doing $250K+ in annual revenue eliminate operational friction with custom AI agents, software integrations, and process automation.

## About
Gamma Tech Group maps operational workflows, identifies the friction points costing time and money, and deploys a tailored mix of AI agents, software integrations, and automation to remove them — so teams focus on revenue instead of repetition. Based in Atlanta, GA; serving clients across the United States.

## Services
- AI Integration — custom AI agents built around real workflows
- Business Automation — removing repetitive manual work
- Workflow Consulting — auditing operations and finding bottlenecks
- Software Integration — connecting disconnected tools and systems

## Who it's for
Businesses generating $250K+ in annual revenue that are bottlenecked by manual processes, disconnected software, or admin work that distracts from growth.

## Contact
- Website: https://gammatechgroup.com/
- Email: hello@gammatechgroup.com
- Free evaluation: book via the form on the homepage
